description: Enumerate the entire current catalogue of Romanian supermarket deals on zgârcit.ro (Lidl, Kaufland, Penny, Auchan, Mega Image, Carrefour, Profi, Selgros, Metro) by fetching paginated server-rendered pages and parsing the Next.js RSC payload — ~18,713 products across ~312 pages of 60.
